title: Defender's Modpack
description: This is a random modpack i created
body:
This a random modpack lmfao

PLEASE USE THE LATEST VERSION IN VERSIONS!

This is an ORIGINS modpack. It includes a lot of performance upgrades, charm, more animations, WTHIT, grave spawning, visual upgrades, protection from being reported(see: link), and more!

This modpack is updated very frequently, so it is recommended that you join my server for updates!

Mods used:

  • Origins
  • Charm
  • Auth Me
  • Better Sodium Video Settings Button
  • Blinking Skin Port
  • Chat Heads
  • Clumps
  • Enchantment Descriptions
  • Entity Culling
  • Ferritecore
  • Indium
  • Inventory HUD+
  • Iris Shaders
  • LazyDFU
  • Mod Menu
  • No Chat Reports
  • Not Enough Animations
  • Not Enough Crashes (Fabric)
  • Pehkui
  • Reese's Sodium Options
  • Effective
  • Illuminations
  • Sodium
  • Sodium Extra
  • Starlight(Fabric)
  • Tweakeroo
  • WTHIT
  • You're in grave danger
  • Visuality
  • Plus all the APIs
  • and many more...

  • Resource Packs and Shaders

  • Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
  • EBE Sign Plus
  • Icon Options(sodium version)
  • Better Crops 3D
  • Complementary Shaders: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/complementary-shaders
  • Complementary Reimagined
  • Oceano Shaders

    Please Report any missing/bugged mods in my server by opening a ticket.

    You can recommend mods by opening a ticket in my server!

    This modpack can also be found on curseforge: CF Link
